columns.extraction_plan: The text states "Median survival was 46 months (IQR 25, 92) in the SOC-alone group and 79 months (IQR 33, not reached) in the SOC + AAP group". Extract "79" from this sentence as the median OS for the treatment group (SOC + AAP).
